case_title: ESTELLE BUTLER VELASCO VS. ALPHA CARGO

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT REQUESTING A DISMISSAL OF THE CASE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY VELASCO, ESTELLE BUTLER AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA CARGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALPHA CARGO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT ALPHA CARGO

DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. DEFENDANT CHALLENGES VENUE - PLAINTIFF LIVED IN DALY CITY. DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS IS IN OAKLAND. PACKAGES WERE PICKED UP IN DALY CITY. CONTACT MADE IN OAKLAND. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CLAIM IS DISMISSED.
